map.alt: Blank outline map of the United States with county lines

items.label: Boston
items.hint: Massachusetts Bay's largest port, and a hotbed of revolutionary activity.

items.label: New York
items.hint: Founded as New Amsterdam by the Dutch before becoming an English colony.

items.label: Philadelphia
items.hint: William Penn's 'city of brotherly love,' and home to the Continental Congress.

items.label: Jamestown
items.hint: The first permanent English settlement in North America, founded 1607.

items.label: Charleston
items.hint: A wealthy Southern port built on the rice and indigo trade.

items.label: Savannah
items.hint: Founded by James Oglethorpe as the capital of Georgia, the last of the thirteen colonies.
